resume.terminal.title: Interactive CV Query Shell
resume.terminal.placeholder: Ask about skills, certified, TechNexus, or relocate...
resume.terminal.welcome: Welcome to the JaiCab CV Query Interface. Try asking: "What is your stack?", "Are you certified?", "Tell me about TechNexus", or "Are you open to relocate?"
resume.terminal.skills: My core stack includes: {skillsList}. I specialize in building distributed caching layers, serverless ingest pipelines, and row-level locked transaction storefronts.
resume.terminal.certs: I hold two premium certifications: 1) AWS Certified Solutions Architect (Professional) - ID: AWS-SAP-9821; 2) CNCF Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) - ID: CKA-88301.
resume.terminal.technexus: At TechNexus Systems (2022-Present), I serve as Senior Solutions Architect. I migrated a legacy monolith to AWS microservices, optimized CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment times by 45%, and mentored a team of 12 full-stack engineers.
resume.terminal.location: I am currently based in San Francisco, CA. I am open to hybrid roles in the Bay Area, as well as full-remote positions globally.
resume.terminal.education: I completed my Bachelor of Science in Computer Science & Engineering from University of California, Berkeley (2013-2017), graduating with Honors (GPA 3.82/4.00) and specializing in Distributed Systems.
resume.terminal.noMatch: No direct match found for "{input}". Try asking about my "stack", "certifications", "education", or current role at "TechNexus".
resume.terminal.skills.fallback: TypeScript, Go, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS Cloud, and Redis
